subcodes.first_line: O thou candle in the gathering of divine knowledge! Though a letter was written a few days ago, now, as though bound in chains and fetters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محفل عرفان چند روز پیش نوشته نگاشته شد و حال چون مغلول اغلال و سلاسل
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
